MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dexter B. Louie, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington, Tel. 415.288.9800, for Defendant and moving party;
Edward M. Price, Esq. of the L/O of Clarence Livingston, Jr., Tel. 510.452.3535, for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Granted. Plaintiff was aware that her son's death might have been caused by wrongdoing thirteen months before she brought suit. Affirmative defense of statute of limitation is established.
